Introduction to Core Courses by 傅思元翔 in 2025

[[BLOCK:p_3]]
Course Title: Human Resource Management (人力资源管理) and Company Performance Improvement

[[BLOCK:p_5]]
Note: This course can also be titled as "Strategic Human Resource Management (战略人力资源管理)," "Enterprise Management Implementation System (企业管理落地系统)," "HR Course for Non-HR Managers (非人力资源经理的人力资源课)," or "HR Management for Decision Makers (决策者的人力资源管理)."
